method: Live top-3 bottleneck proxy over the with-vs-without-Graphify study.
scope_note: This is an honest measured proxy, not the removed synthetic 10-task harness.

metrics.rationale: The graph-assisted rows carry explicit node and source_file evidence for all 3 cases; the answers still do not cite full relation-confidence-source triples, so this is not scored as perfect.
Measured context fell from 8125 tokens without Graphify to 1302 tokens with Graphify, an 84.0% reduction.
Both study arms were evaluated on the same 3 ground-truth bottleneck source files and received equal 5/5 quality.
The assisted path starts from the Graphify neighbourhood, matching the Part B routing protocol; the baseline path uses broad full-source reading.
